description: Phase 5.2 self-consistency config. When enabled, Stage 6 switches from 'regenerate-once on cascade fail' to 'sample N candidates up-front, rank by consistency, cascade through the ranked list until one passes.' Roughly triples vision cost; disabled by default.
method_description: content_overlap = stdlib-only token-Jaccard via grounding.content_overlap_ratio. Single supported method since 2026-05-01 (the legacy 'minicheck' method was retired alongside the MiniCheck tier in the grounding cascade).
agreement_weight_description: How much to weight USC-style candidate-vs-candidate agreement vs candidate-vs-reference grounding in the final score (0.0 = pure-reference, 1.0 = pure-pairwise). Default 0.4 leans reference-grounded.
min_score_diff_description: If the top two candidates tie within this margin, prefer whichever one passes the cascade first — no tie-break preference.
